data.title: Monolithic Application
data.description: Instagram primarily runs on a monolithic architecture, which centralizes various services into one large codebase.
data.technical_spec: Implemented in Django (Python framework) with a PostgreSQL backend.

data.title: Microservices Transition
data.description: Gradual transition from a monolithic to a microservices architecture to improve scalability.

data.title: GraphQL API
data.description: Provides a flexible API for data querying, optimizing for mobile clients.
data.technical_spec: GraphQL API endpoints for data querying and mutations.

data.title: AWS Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Utilizes Amazon Web Services for scalable hosting and content delivery.
data.technical_spec: Elastic Load Balancing, EC2, S3 buckets for storage.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Employs a CDN to deliver images and videos efficiently worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Akamai and Fastly for global CDN distribution.
